main_track.bias_notes: A massive 7/8-mile track featuring an open stretch and an incredibly long 1,255-foot home straight. Wire-to-wire speed is very difficult to sustain.
main_track.post_bias: Posts 4, 5, and 6 are statistically dominant. Inside posts (1-3) require gate speed to avoid being trapped.

handicapping_angles.the_endless_stretch_swoop: Heavily downgrade one-dimensional front-runners. The long straight is a graveyard for tired leaders; upgrade closers.
handicapping_angles.the_bullring_tax: Apply the 'Bullring Tax' to horses shipping in from half-mile tracks, as they frequently hit the wall at the 7/8 pole.
